title: lastrea canariensis
intro: Lastrea canariensis, also known as the Canary Island lady fern, is a species of fern native to the Canary Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and inflammation, which may help alleviate conditions like arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Herbal preparations of Lastrea canariensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
